stages.name: Data Collection
stages.description: Assemble the core source pack, normalize it for research use, and hand it off to screening.
stages.template_description: Editable template for source collection, normalization readiness, and screening handoff.

stages.name: Screening
stages.description: Initial pass/fail/watchlist screen before deeper work.
stages.template_description: Imported from the approved v5 source candidate screening questionnaire.

stages.name: Business Underwriting
stages.description: Underwrite the business model, moat durability, industry structure, and downside case.
stages.template_name: Stock Candidate Business Underwriting Questionnaire v2
stages.template_description: Imported from the approved business underwriting questionnaire.

stages.name: Management Underwriting
stages.description: Evaluate capital allocation, incentives, candor, governance, and owner orientation.
stages.template_name: Stock Candidate Management Underwriting Questionnaire v1
stages.template_description: Imported from the approved management underwriting questionnaire.

stages.name: Financial Underwriting
stages.description: Normalize owner earnings, returns on capital, resilience, accounting quality, and balance sheet risk.
stages.template_name: Stock Candidate Financial Underwriting Questionnaire v1
stages.template_description: Imported from the approved financial underwriting questionnaire.

stages.name: Valuation and Position Size
stages.description: Estimate conservative value ranges, margin of safety, expected return, and position size.
stages.template_name: Stock Candidate Valuation And Position Size Questionnaire v2
stages.template_description: Imported from the valuation and position size questionnaire.

stages.name: Execution Rules
stages.description: Define buy rules, monitoring rules, sell rules, kill criteria, and review cadence.
stages.template_name: Stock Candidate Execution Rules Questionnaire v1
stages.template_description: Imported from the execution rules questionnaire.
